Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Defendants' Discovery Request
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James R. Picker, of Philip M. Andersen & Associates, Tel. 925.225.6854, for defendants and moving party, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

RULING: DEFENDANT KAMEL KARAJAH DBA THAT'S IT GROCERY Motion To Compel Responses To Defendants' Discovery Request is granted. No opposition was filed. The plaintiff shall serve verified responses to the defendant's Request for Production of Documents, Set Number Two within 10 days. The defendant's request for sanctions in the amount of $584.00 is GRANTED. Sanctions to be paid within 30 days. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
